name: vs-marketplace
description: Publish Visual Studio extension to the Visual Studio Marketplace
author: Jesse Houwing

inputs.name: operation
inputs.label: Operation
inputs.helpMarkDown:
The operation to perform:

- **Publish**: Publish a VSIX to the Visual Studio Marketplace
- **Package**: Package a Visual Studio extension into a VSIX file

inputs.name: connectionType
inputs.label: Connection Type
inputs.helpMarkDown:
**Authentication method** for Visual Studio Marketplace operations:

- **PAT**: Use Personal Access Token (recommended for most users)
- **WorkloadIdentity**: Use workload identity federation (no secrets needed, requires service connection)
- **AzureRM**: Use Azure Resource Manager with OIDC (no secrets needed, requires Azure RM service connection)

inputs.name: connectionNamePAT
inputs.label: Service Connection
inputs.helpMarkDown:
**Visual Studio Marketplace service connection** configured with a Personal Access Token (PAT).

**Required scopes**: Marketplace (Publish)

Create a PAT at: https://dev.azure.com/_usersSettings/tokens

inputs.name: connectionNameWorkloadIdentity
inputs.label: Visual Studio Marketplace Service Connection
inputs.helpMarkDown:
**Visual Studio Marketplace Workload Identity service connection** used to authenticate marketplace operations without PAT secrets.

Use this connection when `connectionType = WorkloadIdentity` for federated authentication.

inputs.name: connectionNameAzureRM
inputs.label: Azure RM Connection
inputs.helpMarkDown:
**Azure Resource Manager service connection** using workload identity federation (OIDC).

**Benefits**: No secrets or PAT tokens needed - uses federated Azure credentials

**Required**: Connection must have access to Visual Studio Marketplace scope (`499b84ac-1321-427f-aa17-267ca6975798`)

inputs.name: manifestFile
inputs.label: Manifest file
inputs.helpMarkDown: Path for the publish manifest file. [More information](https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/visualstudio/extensibility/walkthrough-publishing-a-visual-studio-extension-via-command-line)

inputs.name: ignoreWarnings
inputs.label: Warnings to ignore
inputs.helpMarkDown: List of warnings to ignore when publishing an extension (e.g., "VSIXValidatorWarning01,VSIXValidatorWarning02").

inputs.name: vsixManifest
inputs.label: VSIX Manifest file
inputs.helpMarkDown: Path to the `.vsixmanifest` file that describes the extension to package.

inputs.name: outputPath
inputs.label: Output path
inputs.helpMarkDown: The output path (directory or full `.vsix` file path) for the packaged extension.

inputs.name: contentDir
inputs.label: Content directory
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional path to the directory containing the extension content files. If omitted, the directory of the manifest file is used.

outputVariables.name: vsixFile
outputVariables.description: Full path to the packaged `.vsix` file. Only set when operation is Package.
